name: Barbarian
description_en: Fierce warriors who channel primal rage to fuel devastating attacks.
description_pt: Guerreiros ferozes que canalizam fúria primal para alimentar ataques devastadores.

name: Bard
weapon_proficiencies: Simple weapons, Hand crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords
description_en: Versatile performers who weave magic through words and music.
description_pt: Artistas versáteis que tecem magia por meio de palavras e música.

name: Cleric
description_en: Divine agents who channel the power of their deity.
description_pt: Agentes divinos que canalizam o poder de sua divindade.

name: Druid
weapon_proficiencies: Clubs, Daggers, Darts, Javelins, Maces, Quarterstaffs, Scimitars, Sickles, Slings, Spears
description_en: Guardians of nature who wield elemental and primal magic.
description_pt: Guardiões da natureza que empunham magia elemental e primal.

name: Fighter
description_en: Masters of martial combat, trained with every weapon and armor.
description_pt: Mestres do combate marcial, treinados com todas as armas e armaduras.

name: Monk
description_en: Martial artists who harness the body's inner energy as ki.
description_pt: Artistas marciais que dominam a energia interior do corpo como ki.

name: Paladin
description_en: Holy warriors bound by sacred oaths to fight evil.
description_pt: Guerreiros sagrados vinculados por juramentos sagrados para combater o mal.

name: Ranger
description_en: Warriors of the wilderness who track and hunt foes.
description_pt: Guerreiros da natureza que rastreiam e caçam inimigos.

name: Rogue
weapon_proficiencies: Simple weapons, Hand crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords
description_en: Skilled infiltrators who strike with precision and cunning.
description_pt: Infiltradores habilidosos que atacam com precisão e astúcia.

name: Sorcerer
weapon_proficiencies: Daggers, Darts, Slings, Quarterstaffs, Light crossbows
description_en: Innate spellcasters whose magic flows from within.
description_pt: Conjuradores inatos cuja magia flui de dentro.

name: Warlock
description_en: Spellcasters who draw power from a pact with an otherworldly patron.
description_pt: Conjuradores que obtêm poder de um pacto com um patrono sobrenatural.

name: Wizard
weapon_proficiencies: Daggers, Darts, Slings, Quarterstaffs, Light crossbows
description_en: Scholarly mages who study arcane texts to unlock powerful magic.
description_pt: Magos estudiosos que estudam textos arcanos para desbloquear magia poderosa.
